name: toss-ux
description: Toss Apps UX writing and dark-pattern prevention guidance for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Toss-style Korean UX writing and dark-pattern checks
interface.longDescription: A portable Toss Apps UX writing and dark-pattern prevention skill for Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode. Use it to review Korean copy, CTA clarity, consent prompts, ads, navigation, and launch risks.
defaultPrompt: Review this flow for Toss UX writing and dark-pattern risks
Rewrite this Korean product copy in Toss-like UX writing style
Check CTA labels, dialogs, and ad/consent prompts before launch
